changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'sputum'

changeSet.comment: Link Sputum to Tuberculosis Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 1, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'sputum';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bronchoalveolar lavage'

changeSet.comment: Link Bronchoalveolar Lavage (BAL) to Tuberculosis Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 2, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bronchoalveolar lavage';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pleural fluid'

changeSet.comment: Link Pleural Fluid to Tuberculosis Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 3, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pleural fluid';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'cerebrospinal fluid'

changeSet.comment: Link Cerebrospinal Fluid to Tuberculosis Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 4, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'cerebrospinal fluid';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'tissue'

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'body fluid'

changeSet.comment: Link Body Fluid to Tuberculosis Laboratory department

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'lymph node'

changeSet.comment: Link Lymph Node to Tuberculosis Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 9, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'lymph node';
